title: oenothera hirta var. exfoliata
intro: Oenothera hirta var. exfoliata, also known as hairy evening primrose, is a plant species that belongs to the Onagraceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oenothera hirta var. exfoliata include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
